inputs.label: Standard Reduction Potential (E°)
inputs.businessContext: The standard reduction potential of the half-reaction under standard conditions (1 M, 1 atm, 25°C).

inputs.label: Number of Electrons Transferred (n)
inputs.businessContext: Stoichiometric number of electrons in the half-reaction.

inputs.label: Concentration of Oxidized Species [Ox]
inputs.businessContext: Molar concentration of the oxidized species (reactant).

inputs.label: Concentration of Reduced Species [Red]
inputs.businessContext: Molar concentration of the reduced species (product).

inputs.label: Stoichiometric Coefficient of Oxidized Species (a)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient for the oxidized species in the balanced half-reaction: aOx + ne- → bRed.

inputs.label: Stoichiometric Coefficient of Reduced Species (b)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient for the reduced species in the balanced half-reaction.

formulas.E: E0 - (8.314 * T) / (n * 96485) * Math.log( Math.pow(Red, b) / Math.pow(Ox, a) )
